What's a topic based approach? That

relationships and then learning 10 words
which belong to the same topic. In this
way, you are creating folders in your
brain. And in each folder, there are
some words and phrases, some
collocations. And so, you're basically
organizing everything. And that makes it
a lot easier for your brain to process
the new words. And so, when you try to
speak English, it'll be easier for your
